name: Old Glory Bank
description_short: Online bank offering personal and business checking, savings, home loans, and crypto integration. Positions itself as a patriotic alternative bank with plans to unify traditional banking and cryptocurrency.
description_long:
Old Glory Bank launched its first online account in 2023 and markets itself as a pro-America bank targeting customers concerned with privacy, security, and financial freedom. The bank explicitly positions itself as an alternative to what it calls "debanking," emphasizing its commitment to serving customers across the political and ideological spectrum without discrimination. The company is pursuing a business combination with Digital Asset Acquisition Corp. to become a publicly listed Texas company on Nasdaq, signaling aggressive growth plans.

The bank offers standard personal banking products including checking and savings accounts (some without monthly fees), certificates of deposit, debit cards with access to 40,000+ ATMs, early direct deposit access (2-3 days early), and cash deposit options at 88,000+ retail locations. For business customers, Old Glory provides business checking and savings, business lending (conventional and SBA loans), cash solutions, international payments, and business insights tools. The company also offers home loans (conventional, FHA, VA, refinance) and home equity products. A distinguishing feature is "Old Glory Protect," a $100,000 line-of-duty death benefit program free to active-duty military, law enforcement, fire, and Border Patrol agents with checking accounts and direct deposit.

The most significant differentiator is Old Glory's announced crypto integration strategy. The bank claims it will be "the first bank to easily link your crypto, stablecoins, and self-custodial wallet into a single dashboard combined with OGB Accounts," enabling on-ramp/off-ramp functionality for US dollars and cryptocurrencies. The bank is developing OGBUSD, a stablecoin backed 1:1 by US dollars, for payments and international remittances. This crypto focus, combined with explicit messaging about political freedom and rejection of "debanking," clearly targets ideologically-aligned customers skeptical of traditional banking institutions.

Honestly, Old Glory Bank remains very early-stage with significant unproven claims. Launched in 2023, the bank is still privately held and seeking public markets. The crypto dashboard and stablecoin (OGBUSD) are repeatedly described as "coming soon" with no launch date provided. Regulatory approval for bank-integrated crypto services remains uncertain. While the patriotic branding and crypto promises appeal to a specific demographic, new depositors should understand they're banking with a startup, not an established institution. The marketing heavily emphasizes ideology over financial product details, and key innovation claims remain vaporware. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking and savings accounts (some fee-free options)
Home loans (conventional, FHA, VA loans, refinance, home equity loans and lines of credit)
Business lending (conventional loans, SBA loans, equipment and inventory financing)
Debit cards with fraud controls and alerts
Business Insights (cash flow forecasting and industry benchmarks)
ACH and wire transfers including international payments
Cash deposit solutions at 88,000+ retail locations
Direct deposit with early access (2-3 days early)
Old Glory Protect (line-of-duty death benefit for protectors)
Planned: Crypto dashboard linking self-custodial wallets and stablecoins to bank accounts
Planned: OGBUSD stablecoin for payments and remittances
pros: Access to 40,000+ in-network ATMs nationwide plus cash deposits at 88,000+ retail locations for broad cash access
Free $100,000 line-of-duty death benefit for active-duty military, law enforcement, fire, and Border Patrol agents—unique industry offering
Early direct deposit access up to 2-3 days ahead of scheduled deposit date
Checking and savings accounts available without monthly fees
Free debit card with customizable controls and fraud alerts
Business accounts with competitive low monthly fees, low minimums, and industry-specific lending support
Plans for integrated crypto dashboard and stablecoin (OGBUSD) to link traditional banking with cryptocurrency—first-mover claim in this space
cons: Bank is only 1-2 years old (launched 2023) with no long operating history or established reputation, significantly higher counterparty risk than century-old banks
Key advertised features like crypto dashboard and OGBUSD stablecoin are repeatedly labeled "coming soon" with no published launch date or regulatory approval confirmation
Marketing heavily emphasizes ideology and political positioning over detailed product information, fees, rates, and terms
As a startup seeking Nasdaq listing, the bank's regulatory status and ability to scale banking infrastructure remain unproven
FDIC insurance information and deposit protection limits are not prominently displayed on the main website content provided

contact.address: 206 S Main St, Elmore City, OK 73433

best_for: Ideologically-aligned customers seeking a bank that explicitly rejects 'debanking' and markets itself as patriotic alternative to traditional institutions
Military, law enforcement, and first responders interested in the exclusive $100,000 line-of-duty death benefit program
Early adopters and cryptocurrency enthusiasts waiting for integrated banking-crypto functionality (once launched)
Small business owners seeking SBA lending with industry-specific support, including 2A community businesses
diagnosis: Old Glory Bank is best for ideologically-driven customers and early adopters willing to bank with a 2023-launched startup in exchange for patriotic branding and promised future crypto integration. The main caveat is that the bank is unproven, its marquee crypto features remain vaporware ("coming soon" with no launch date), and depositors should understand they're taking on significant startup risk not present with established financial institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 206 S Main St, Elmore City, OK 73433
